# Comprasgovbr

## Overview

gSage AI вЂ” Compras.gov.br + Contratos.gov.br procurement tool.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `comprasgovbr` | Query Brazilian federal procurement data via Compras.gov.br and Contratos.gov.br: contracts, bids, price registration, suppliers, material catalog, price research, empenhos, faturas, and aggregated dashboard. | `gov:compras:comprasgovbr:read` | вЂ” | вЂ” |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below вЂ” set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "api_key": "<value>"
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `api_key` | `string` | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | API key for Portal da TransparГЄncia (sanГ§Гµes CEIS/CNEP/CEPIM/CEAF). Obtain at https://portaldatransparencia.gov.br/api-de-dados |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_COMPRASGOVBR__API_KEY` | `api_key` | `string` | вЂ” | вЂ” | API key for Portal da TransparГЄncia (sanГ§Гµes CEIS/CNEP/CEPIM/CEAF). Obtain at https://portaldatransparencia.gov.br/api-de-dados |

## Operations

### `comprasgovbr`

- **`buscar_contrato_ug_origem`** вЂ” _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `codigo_uasg` | `integer` | вЂ” | [buscar_contrato_ug_origem] UASG origin code. Example: 110001. |
  | `numero_contrato` | `string` | вЂ” | [buscar_contrato_ug_origem] Contract number/year format. Example: '00022/2025'. |

- **`buscar_contratos_fornecedor`** вЂ” Search contracts by supplier CPF/CNPJ via Portal da TransparГЄncia. Paginates through all available pages (15 items/page). Results are cached for 6 hours (PostgreSQL). Supports client-side filters for date range, agency name, and contract object. Sanctions (CEIS/CNEP/CEPIM/CEAF) are queried in parallel. CSV auto-generated when results exceed 30 rows.

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `cpf_cnpj` | `string` | вњ… | CPF (11 digits) or CNPJ (14 digits) do fornecedor. Aceita formatado ou sГі dГ­gitos. |
  | `max_results` | `integer` | вЂ” | Max contracts to return (default 50, max 500). |
  | `export_csv` | `boolean` | вЂ” | Force CSV export. Auto-generated when >30 rows. |
  | `vigencia_min` | `string` | вЂ” | Filter: start date >= value (YYYY-MM-DD, YYYYMMDD, or DD/MM/YYYY). Client-side. |
  | `vigencia_max` | `string` | вЂ” | Filter: end date <= value (YYYY-MM-DD, YYYYMMDD, or DD/MM/YYYY). Client-side. |
  | `filtro_orgao` | `string` | вЂ” | Filter by agency name (case-insensitive substring). Client-side. |
  | `filtro_objeto` | `string` | вЂ” | Filter by term in contract object/description. Client-side. |
  | `force_refresh` | `boolean` | вЂ” | Bypass cache and fetch fresh data. |

- **`buscar_materiais`** вЂ” _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `palavra` | `string` | вЂ” | Search term for buscar_materiais. CATMAT searches product GROUP names (PDM), not individual items. Try generic terms: 'microcomputador' (PDM 6661), 'veiculo', 'mesa', 'cadeira', 'notebook', 'ar condicionado', 'servidor'. If results seem unrelated to your search term, the PDM name matched loosely; try a different word. Use the 'codigo' from results as 'codigo_material' in pesquisar_precos. |
  | `codigo_material` | `integer` | вЂ” | PDM (Product Group) code for pesquisar_precos. Obtained via buscar_materiais вЂ” use the 'codigo' field from results, NOT 'codigo_item'. Example: 6661 for microcomputadores. вљ пёЏ PDM codes are GROUP-level вЂ” verify the purchase descriptions (descricaoItem) in results to confirm they match what you're looking for. |
  | `codigo_pdm` | `integer` | вЂ” | PDM code from buscar_materiais to list all CATMAT items in that group. Use listar_materiais_por_pdm to browse the full catalog before picking a material for pesquisar_precos. Example: 6661 for microcomputadores. |

- **`buscar_orgao`** вЂ” _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `codigo_orgao` | `integer` | вЂ” | Compras gov org code. Required for listar_contratos. For dashboard and listar_atas, use codigo_uasg instead or the tool will auto-resolve. Use buscar_orgao(codigo_uasg=...) to discover. Example: 20101 = PresidГЄncia da RepГєblica. |
  | `codigo_siorg` | `string` | вЂ” | [buscar_orgao] SIORG org code to look up the corresponding Compras/UASG code. Example: '334'. |

- **`buscar_servicos`** вЂ” _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `codigo_servico` | `integer` | вЂ” | [buscar_servicos] CATSER service code. Example: 1. |

- **`pesquisar_precos`** вЂ” _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `palavra` | `string` | вЂ” | Search term for buscar_materiais. CATMAT searches product GROUP names (PDM), not individual items. Try generic terms: 'microcomputador' (PDM 6661), 'veiculo', 'mesa', 'cadeira', 'notebook', 'ar condicionado', 'servidor'. If results seem unrelated to your search term, the PDM name matched loosely; try a different word. Use the 'codigo' from results as 'codigo_material' in pesquisar_precos. |
  | `codigo_material` | `integer` | вЂ” | PDM (Product Group) code for pesquisar_precos. Obtained via buscar_materiais вЂ” use the 'codigo' field from results, NOT 'codigo_item'. Example: 6661 for microcomputadores. вљ пёЏ PDM codes are GROUP-level вЂ” verify the purchase descriptions (descricaoItem) in results to confirm they match what you're looking for. |
  | `codigo_pdm` | `integer` | вЂ” | PDM code from buscar_materiais to list all CATMAT items in that group. Use listar_materiais_por_pdm to browse the full catalog before picking a material for pesquisar_precos. Example: 6661 for microcomputadores. |
  | `uf` | `string` | вЂ” | State abbreviation for pesquisar_precos. Example: 'RJ'. |

| Tool | Permissions |

| `comprasgovbr` | `gov:compras:comprasgovbr:read` |
